full_text:
Li Yizi 李移子
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Li Yizi (李移子). Oath brother of Gongsun Zan, disreputable cloth seller. Li Yizi was affiliated with Gongsun Zan.
